Re-Elect · Fall 2026

Re-Elect James Nolan

Proven Leadership. Real Results.

James Nolan has delivered measurable results for the residents of Northeast Yonkers, Bronxville, and Eastchester — protecting taxpayers, investing in public safety, strengthening local businesses, improving infrastructure, supporting veterans, and ensuring county government works for the people.

🗳️ Election Day Tuesday, Nov 3, 2026 · Early voting starts Oct 24

Meet James

A Lifelong Neighbor Serving His Community

James Nolan has spent his life rooted in this community — as a neighbor, a union member, a foundation founder, and a public servant who shows up for the people of District 15.

"I've never forgotten where I come from — and I'll always fight for the neighbors I grew up alongside."

  • ★Lifelong Yonkers resident — deeply connected to the neighborhoods he serves.
  • ★Saunders Trade & Technical High School graduate, High Honors.
  • ★Associate Degree in Criminal Justice, Western Oklahoma State College.
  • ★Longtime Teamster union member — a proven advocate for working families.
  • ★Founder of the Michael Nolan Foundation, created in memory of his brother Michael to provide scholarships and support the community.
  • ★Community service through food drives, PPE drives, youth initiatives, and neighborhood improvement projects.
  • ★Family man — lives in Yonkers with his wife Dianne and their children.
Leadership

Chairman. Advocate. Public Servant.

James leads on the committees that matter most to working families, small businesses, and those who served our country.

Chairman

Small Business Committee

  • Supporting entrepreneurs across District 15
  • Helping local businesses grow and thrive
  • Encouraging job creation in our communities
  • Strengthening the local economy
Chairman

Veterans Advisory Committee

  • Advocating for veterans and their needs
  • Supporting military families
  • Expanding county resources for those who served
  • Honoring the service and sacrifice of our veterans

Committee Memberships

Your Vote

Make Your Plan to Vote

This fall, District 15 decides. Here's how and when to make your voice heard.

📝
Oct 24, 2026

Register By

Last day for voter registration applications to be received for the General Election.

🗳️
Oct 24 – Nov 1

Early Voting

Nine days of early in-person voting across New York before Election Day.

🇺🇸
Nov 3, 2026

Election Day

Polls are open 6:00 AM – 9:00 PM. Vote to Re-Elect James Nolan.

Confirm your registration, poll site, and hours with the Westchester County Board of Elections before you go.
